title: 040 sk-doc Conformance Sweep and Template Cleanup
description: Brings all manual_testing_playbook, feature_catalog, and skill reference surfaces into strict sk-doc conformance; deletes templates/sharded; renames templates/stress-test → stress_test (with new README); aligns templates/changelog to sk-doc shape; renames templates/addendum/level3plus-govern → level3-plus-govern; sweeps all path references; rewrites .opencode/plugins/README.md per sk-doc README template.
